title: SEC Pledges Support for Economic Prosperity: Outlines Key Initiatives - FinancialEDGE
description: The Securities and Exchange Commission has expressed its unwavering commitment to the advancement and prosperity of the Nigerian capital market and the economy in general in line with President Bola Tinubu’s Renewed Hope Agenda. Director General of the SEC, Dr. Emomotimi Agama who stated this during the Second Post CMC briefing held in Lagos, Thursday,
html: The Securities and Exchange Commission has expressed its unwavering commitment to the advancement and prosperity of the Nigerian capital market and the economy in general in line with President Bola Tinubu’s Renewed Hope Agenda.
